verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He said behold I stand knocking at the door Whosoever will hear his voice and let him in And why you linger when today you hear him call your name So harden not your heart for tomorrow maybe too late.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Harden not your heart if you hear his voice today Let Jesus come in and make your life a new, He's been waiting here so long for you to turn to him So harden not your heart if you hear his voice today.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He went to the cross just to rescue you and me He said, "Father forgive them for they don't know what they do." Just believe been born again salvation has been paid it's free, So harden not your heart if you hear his voice today.
